horoscope: Today's Mars-Neptune aspect encourages a detour from serious thought or concentrated focus, dear Aries, and it’s likely to do you a world of good. You could enjoy news that delights and inspires or a conversation that soothes. This transit brings together your sensitivity and enthusiasm, and it’s a magical combination that leads you to the right places and boosts your magnetism at the same time. Presenting your ideas can be rewarding and successful. You’re also more inclined than usual to follow a fun whim. The Moon heads into your privacy sector, giving another signal to slow your roll.

While in some areas you need to structure your life more soundly, dear Taurus, there is terrific energy today for doing something non-routine, creative, and fulfilling. The key to success now is to slow yourself down a little so that you can let inspiration in! This is the best approach now with Mars connecting with Neptune. You might work happily towards a creative goal or a special project, and it's a time for riding on an inspired feeling. It's a good time for insight into finances, money-making ideas, and ventures that benefit from design and imagination. You could find that support happens behind the scenes, that you get things done in solitude, or that you are happiest pursuing personal goals. You learn more through doing and experiencing today than overthinking, and you gravitate to activities that improve your bottom line or help you express your need for more security in your life.

Mars in your sign encourages your independence, dear Gemini, and you can sometimes push a little hard with this transit. However, today's Mars-Neptune aspect softens corners, adding an extra touch of magic and intuition to the mix. You’re gently taking the lead and inspiring trust in the people around you, especially as the day advances. It’s a good time to let go of the pressure to guide or control your day or reach your goals quickly. You’ll find that others are especially cooperative, and networking efforts bring rewards. You benefit from slowing down a little to let your imagination and intuition into the equation. Personal magnetism is strong, and you’re getting noticed now. A smooth, even approach is best now.

With today’s Mars-Neptune transit, dear Cancer, taking part in healing, calming activities can benefit you greatly, and instincts can help benefit and influence career and practical choices. You've been rather riled up, and while your desire to make changes is real and will continue to motivate you, you're recognizing the need to intuit and imagine. This can be a time when you’re reminded of your commitments in a most pleasant manner, and you can feel especially good about working on a project or endeavor that’s designed to last. Physically winding down aids intuition, but you may want to act on your creative hunches or ideas, and the chance to do so might emerge now. Today's Moon also reminds you that a change of pace is attractive.

While your desire for change and improvement remains strong today, dear Leo, your approach is evolving. You may tune in to your imagination and enjoy yourself increasingly as the day advances, and learn new and interesting things about friends and the world around you as you do. You're finding inspiration through your interactions today, although it's just as likely that you can inspire people in your life. Activities that benefit from creative or imaginative flourishes can thrive now. Take a break from the usual routine if you can, as doing different, new, and refreshing things tends to open you to your intuition. A Mars-Neptune influence today helps you believe in the possibility of your dreams. Teaching and learning may be in focus and are likely to come quite naturally to you today.

Slowing down today makes more sense than it may first seem, dear Virgo. You've been quite wound up, ready for change, but today's Mars-Neptune transit reminds you that diffuse thinking allows you to let the magic of your imagination loose and can move you forward in ways that may not have happened if you didn't take this kind of break. With today's energies, the most successful activities are imaginative, creative, and non-routine. Creative hunches may very well lead to important discoveries. Research can be rewarding, particularly if you're doing work based on an intuition or sudden inspiration. Others seem more supportive and generous than usual, and this, combined with your own generosity, can help you make huge strides towards your goals. Focusing on something absorbing can give you a motivating sense of purpose.

Today's Mars-Neptune aspect encourages your interest in creative and imaginative activities, dear Libra. Relationships thrive as you come to a better understanding of one another’s perspective, and benefits come from disengaging from stressful or tense thoughts and feelings for a spell. It can certainly be a time to regroup emotionally. Still, this can also be a good time to involve someone special or do something physical. You require refreshment and release, and at the end of it, you may come back with a better solution than you would have if you kept plugging away, seeking an answer. Creative pursuits or physical activities that help you release tension or express your emotions are in favor. Sharing personal philosophies or a small adventure with someone can refresh and clear your mind. This is an important day for finding ways to slow down or wind down.

A boosting aspect between energetic Mars and spiritual Neptune encourages you to set your own pace today, dear Scorpio. You remain quite motivated to make changes and improvements, but your approach is altering. You may find that you require refreshment that helps clear your mind and gets you in better touch with your intuition. Doing the same old things could be a waste of opportunities. Going lightly on the usual routine or easing up on the hot pursuit of your goals makes sense, and so does doing something imaginative or colorful instead, even if it's a small venture. Trusting your inner guide can lead to inspired research, investigation, or the pursuit of healthy solutions. You can benefit from reading between the lines now, as seeing more layers to a situation can be valuable. Straying somewhat from your routine can open the door to new ways of thinking and opportunities you might not have imagined otherwise. Setting your own pace, if this is possible, can serve you very well today.

The day’s energies seem to prioritize soul-cleansing, imaginative, and inspiring activities, dear Sagittarius. The Moon moves into your solar fourth house, reminding you of the need to touch base with your fundamental needs. As well, Mars harmonizes with Neptune, and the ability to bend, adjust, stretch, and accommodate is beneficial, as it allows more room for creativity and magic, especially in your relationships. There can be a heightened sense of understanding of a person or relationship. It’s useful to ease back from direct action and let your faith or inner guide take the lead, especially if you’ve been stepping on the gas. A change of approach comes in handy! You might make a connection that feels meant to be.

Mars and Neptune harmonize today, dear Capricorn, and with some refreshment, you may instinctively know how to manage family or co-worker relationships in rewarding ways. You could organically discover an improved way to maintain or restore health, since pulling back from a situation can work wonders in the moment. You may very well need a small change of pace. Energies today encourage a creative approach rather than one that’s too direct. Your desire for change remains powerful today, but your approach is evolving. Slowing down or taking the time to cater to or support someone in your life can be beneficial today, perhaps helping restore the give-and-take balance in a relationship or reduce stress in your life. You might decide to take action to bring more harmony, peace, beauty, or balance to your working and living environments. You might use your creative talents to advance your work, health, or domestic goals.

While you can feel quite ready to make a change, the better strategy today will be to ease back on the focused or direct pursuit of your goals and desires temporarily, dear Aquarius, and this can be strategic or happen naturally. Either way, it's a time for letting some imagination, magic, and inspiration in. Mars and Neptune form a harmonious aspect with one another, and both harmonize with your sign, encouraging a flowing, patient, and creative approach rather than an energetic or rushed one. Your intuition becomes more accessible this way, and while it may seem counter-productive to slow down, you're likely to enjoy more success if you do. At the very least, it can reduce stress, and ideally, it points you in a new, more creative or fulfilling direction. The desire to share your joy with others is strong and encouraged now. The Moon moves into your resources sector today, and it's another signal to take in rather than push ahead.

Mars, currently transiting your home and family sector, harmonizes with Neptune today, dear Pisces. A retreat, relaxation, or spiritual escape would hit the spot right now, and the good news is that this transit can facilitate it in some manner. There are many ways to satisfy the need to do something different, to slow down and appreciate the calmer pace, or to help others and lift their spirits. It's a time for savoring the moments, and you might encourage others to do the same. A more accepting, easygoing, and relaxed attitude improves things with loved ones and around the home. Physically slowing yourself down or taking part in calming activities — even shopping or organizing, if these happen at an easygoing pace — can help you realign. The trick is to pull yourself away from the usual routine. The Moon heads into your sign today, which can also stir the desire for something special.
